task_completion.description: Survey titled 'Site Safety Induction Exam 2024' is created and assessment mode is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the survey title 'Site Safety Induction Exam 2024' in the LimeSurvey interface header or survey list. Verify that assessment mode is enabled, which can be seen in the survey settings or by the presence of the 'Assessments' option in the survey menu.
Look for the group 'OSHA Compliance' in the survey structure menu on the left side of the screen.

task_completion.description: Four mandatory List (Radio) questions are added with the correct text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the four questions in the survey structure or question list. They should be List (Radio) type and mandatory (often indicated by a red asterisk). Keywords to look for in question texts: 'standard color', 'fall protection', 'safe work environment', 'damaged ladder'.

task_completion.description: Assessment values are correctly assigned to the answer options.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the answer options screen where assessment values are set. The correct answers ('Red', '6 feet', 'Everyone on site', 'Tag it Do Not Use and report it') should have an assessment value of 1, and all other options should have a value of 0.

task_completion.description: Assessment rules are configured for scores 0-3 and 4.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Assessments' page showing two rules: one with Minimum 0, Maximum 3, and a message containing 'FAIL - Retraining Required'; and another with Minimum 4, Maximum 4, and a message containing 'PASS - Induction Complete'.
Look for indicators that the survey is active, such as a green 'Active' label, a 'Stop this survey' button, or the survey being open in a live respondent view.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the LimeSurvey web interface in a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the LimeSurvey admin interface in a web browser window. The agent should be clicking through the GUI to create the survey, groups, questions, and rules.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal scripts or database commands to directly insert the survey data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows open where the agent is running SQL commands or scripts to bypass the LimeSurvey GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Survey Title: 'Site Safety Induction Exam 2024'. Group: 'OSHA Compliance'. Q1: 'standard color' (Correct: Red, Value: 1). Q2: 'fall protection' (Correct: 6 feet, Value: 1). Q3: 'safe work environment' (Correct: Everyone on site, Value: 1). Q4: 'damaged ladder' (Correct: Tag it Do Not Use and report it, Value: 1). Rules: Min 0 - Max 3 message contains 'FAIL'; Min 4 - Max 4 message contains 'PASS'.
